plugin.name: YouTubeMusic
plugin.title: YouTube Music
plugin.desc: Browse, search, and stream YouTube Music to your Squeezebox players.
plugin.changes: Changed codec fallback order to MP3 → AAC → FLAC. AAC is preferred over FLAC when libmp3lame is unavailable as it avoids double-transcoding stuttering on piCorePlayer and similar systems.
plugin.creator: schmij97
